sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Real Madrid is in excellent form with 3 consecutive wins and no goals conceded in their last 5 matches, showcasing strong attacking and defensive capabilities. Mallorca, on the other hand, has struggled, managing only 1 point from their last 2 league matches with poor goal-scoring form.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Real Madrid has dominated recent head-to-head encounters, winning 4 out of the last 5 matchups against Mallorca, including a 2-1 and a 3-0 victory in their last two meetings. Mallorca has failed to keep a clean sheet against Madrid in these games.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Real Madrid ranks highly in possession (68%), goals scored (4), and clean sheets (2), indicating control and efficiency. Mallorca’s lower league position (16th) and defensive vulnerabilities (4 goals conceded) highlight their challenges against top teams.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Trends
sections.text: Kylian Mbappé has been exceptional for Real Madrid, averaging an 8.28 Sofascore rating with 6 goals in the last 5 matches. Mallorca lacks standout performers and struggles to convert chances, especially against defensively solid teams like Madrid.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At the break, Real Madrid leads Mallorca 2-1 in a match that has seen an intense first half at the Santiago Bernabéu. Real Madrid struck twice late in the half through Arda Güler and Vinícius Júnior, overturning an early deficit after Vedat Muriqi gave Mallorca the lead. The home side has dominated possession and created more clear-cut opportunities, while Mallorca has shown resilience with a more defensive approach but managed to capitalize on one of their limited chances.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance analysis
halftimeSections.text: Real Madrid has been the more dominant side, controlling the majority of the ball and making frequent entries into the final third and penalty area. Their attacking intent is evident with multiple shots on target and big chances created. Mallorca, on the other hand, has relied on a more compact structure, focusing on defending deep and looking for counter-attacking opportunities. Their physicality in duels has been notable, winning a higher percentage of challenges compared to Real Madrid, though they’ve struggled to create significant chances beyond their early goal.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key player contributions
halftimeSections.text: For Real Madrid, Vinícius Júnior has been a constant threat, finding the back of the net and consistently troubling the Mallorca defense with his pace and dribbling. Arda Güler also made a significant impact with a well-taken goal, showing composure in front of goal. Kylian Mbappé, despite not scoring, has been involved in creating opportunities with several key passes, though he missed a big chance. On the Mallorca side, Vedat Muriqi stands out as their key man, scoring the opener and providing a focal point in attack. Pablo Torre has also been influential with an assist and creative play in midfield.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum review
halftimeSections.text: Real Madrid started the game with strong attacking intent, maintaining pressure in the early stages with consistent forward momentum. Mallorca had brief spells where they pushed back, particularly around the time of their goal, showing they can be dangerous on the counter. As the half progressed, Real Madrid regained control with sustained attacking waves, especially in the latter stages, which culminated in their two quick goals. Mallorca’s attacking threat diminished after their early success, with fewer forays forward as they focused on defending their box.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, Real Madrid is likely to continue their dominance in possession and push for more goals to secure the result. Their attacking firepower, combined with playing at home, gives them the edge to exploit any defensive lapses from Mallorca. Mallorca will need to remain compact and look for opportunities on the break or from set pieces to level the score. Fatigue could play a factor for the away side if they are forced to chase the game, potentially leaving spaces for Real Madrid to exploit. Expect Real Madrid to maintain their pressure and likely add to their tally.
